center.name: Cocora Valley
center.summary: Cocora Valley是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Andean guan，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: For example, it can be found in the Cocora valley in Quindío Department and the Quimbaya protected forest in Risaralda Department of Colombia, and the Yanacocha Reserve of Ecuador

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: For example, it can be found in the Cocora valley in Quindío Department and the Quimbaya protected forest in Risaralda Department of Colombia, and the Yanacocha Reserve of Ecuador
